variants: Uliana Frolova was born in Dawnfeather Point, where her interest in light and shadow first took form. Later, she would go on to invent the Divining Lantern Mechanism, a tool celebrated for its innovative approach to illumination. Today, she resides in Novafern Isle, surrounded by natural beauty that greatly influences her work. Uliana is also a proud member of the Owlshade Watchers Fellowship, a group dedicated to the study and appreciation of nocturnal creatures. In recognition of her contributions, she was honored with the Stellar Ember Distinction, solidifying her reputation in the field.

Uliana's involvement with the Owlshade Watchers Fellowship further showcases her dedication to understanding the world around her. Her achievements were recognized when she received the Stellar Ember Distinction.
